Now let me compile and test it, comparing with the original output.

{"analysis":"Written the C program. Now compile and compare output.","plan":"1. Save original image.ppm
2. Compile and run my version
3. Compare the outputs","commands":[{"keystrokes":"cp image.ppm /tmp/original.ppm
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"gcc -static -o reversed mystery.c -lm 2>&1
","duration":5},{"keystrokes":"./reversed 2>/dev/null
","duration":60}]}
